mnemonics: BESY=Batch, Executable, System, and Y Stallion (Unix variant)
LINUX=Linux Operating System Hugely Universal Not Included
keyPoints: Key point 1: MINIX is an Operating System (MONO)
Key point 2: Unix variants such as Y Stallion (BESY) are operating systems (BESY)
Key point 3: Linux is an open source Operating System (LINUX)
